title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Cuemath - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Cuemath - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cuemath, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cuemath:
Cuemath is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cuemath!
